$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:support_plan block (Nonfiction Pre-Draft Pathway, Increment 2 — the source/evidence map). One block per planned support unit, linking a spine subclaim (subclaim_id, a Cn declared in the argument_spine ladder) to the support the writer intends to bring. SEEDS Argument_State §3 Support Map (docs/argument-state-schema.md): support_type is the §3 five-type set (REASON/EXAMPLE/DATA/AUTHORITY/EXPERIENCE); scheme_hint is the §3 eight-scheme set (optional). `status` distinguishes in-hand support from support still to-acquire; a subclaim with NO support_plan block at all is a BARE ASSERTION (validator W2, once support planning has started). The Firewall holds: the writer plans which evidence to bring; the engine does not invent or fabricate evidence. Validated by scripts/argument_spine.py (A4/A5/A6/W2). See docs/nonfiction-pre-draft.md.
title: APODICTIC support plan (apodictic.support_plan.v1)
